author: Pat
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Count tokens for the active note in the status bar next to word count (GPT, Claude, Gemini).

manifest.author: Pat
manifest.description: Count tokens for the active note in the status bar (GPT, Claude, Gemini).
manifest.name: Token Count

name: Token Count

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Initial release.

- Token count in the status bar for the active Markdown note
- Models: GPT-5, GPT-4o, GPT-4, Claude, Gemini
- Placed after built-in word and character count
- Desktop only
